title: Marketplace Manager - Lenskart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Lenskart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Lenskart Digital Technologies:
Lenskart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart Digital Technologies!
